title: SRS Term
description: A defined entry within a Vocabulary. Terms are the vocabulary-entry substrate: they carry stable identity, a key, optional enrichment, and status.

id.description: Stable UUID identity for this term (definition id, not instance id).

key.description: The string that appears in instance data. Unified substrate key field.

aliases.description: Alternate keys that resolve to this term.

roles.description: Semantic roles. Well-known values: foundation, navigation.

properties.description: Arbitrary metadata per substrate Change H policy.
